Customer Comments: Preferred method of contact - email-
lastDraftText: Hey James, checking back about the CVO Road Glide ST. If helpful, I can send a simple compare and next-step options.

history.body: Hey James, thanks for your test ride inquiry. We actually put a hold on the CVO Road Glide.

lastDraftText: I can set up a trade appraisal. I have Thu, May 7, 4:00 PM or Fri, May 8, 2:30 PM — do any of these times work?

history.body: Loans finalized just need to send them insurance paperwork
Thanks for sending that over John, I will get rolling on everything. What time works for you today?

selectedInboundText: I thought I was signing up for a demo day like Kawasaki does
lastDraftText: Hey Joe, good news — we just got 2026 Harley-Davidson Road Glide in stock. Want details or a time to check it out?

history.body: If the test ride for the Road Glide Limited is still on your list, I can help get it set up.

selectedInboundText: Do you have any Street Bob coming in?
lastDraftText: Hey Jen, just checking in on the 2022 Forty-Eight.

history.body: I’ll check on the status of the Street Bob and follow up with you.

lastDraftText: Awesome, glad that works for you!

history.body: Just let me know when you have a better idea of time so I can have everything lined up.
